TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_matatengil_nu_mapalaway-matatengil_tu_milecuk_20191228, title = matatengil_nu_mapalaway-matatengil_tu_milecuk_20191228, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/matatengil_nu_mapalaway-matatengil_tu_milecuk_20191228} }

S.FORM: matatengil nu mapalaway-matatengil tu milecuk 20191228 nilacul kakitizaan kilaykin musakaput tu micuduhay u kamu nu Sakizaya a kakitizaan tuki 2019.12.28 10:30 natayniay a tademaw 飛亞飛丞Bala,羅正心Balucu',陳妍陵Sabak,林櫻花Dungy,李秀蘭Lisin,李春慈Haluku,林湘渝,林美玲Lubas,曾子綺Dungy,督固撒耘Tuku,潘慧敏Tipus mitelungay ci sakamuay a kawaw 1.nacilaay a matatengil a buhci 2.2020 a mihcaan a paybalucu'ay a kawaw
S.PHON: matatəŋir~ɾ nu mapar~ɾawaj-matatəŋir~ɾ tu mir~ɾəʦuk ******** nir~ɾaʦur~ɾ kakitizaan kir~ɾajkin musakaput tu miʦuduħaj u kamu nu sakizaja a kakitizaan tuki ****.**.** **:** natajniaj a tadəmaw ****bar~ɾa,***bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ,***sabak,***duŋj,***r~ɾisin,***ħar~ɾuku,***,***r~ɾubas,***duŋj,****tuku,***tipus mitər~ɾuŋaj ʦi sakamuaj a kawaw *.naʦir~ɾaaj a matatəŋir~ɾ a buħʦi *.**** a miħʦaan a pajbar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡaj a kawaw
S.FORM: matatengil nu mapalaway-matatengil tu milecuk 20191228 nilacul kakitizaan kilaykin musakaput tu micuduhay u kamu nu Sakizaya a kakitizaan tuki 2019.12.28 10:30 natayniay a tademaw 飛亞飛丞Bala,羅正心Balucu',陳妍陵Sabak,林櫻花Dungy,李秀蘭Lisin,李春慈Haluku,林湘渝,林美玲Lubas,曾子綺Dungy,督固撒耘Tuku,潘慧敏Tipus mitelungay ci sakamuay a kawaw 1.nacilaay a matatengil a buhci 2.2020 a mihcaan a paybalucu'ay a kawaw
S.PHON: matatəŋir~ɾ nu mapar~ɾawaj-matatəŋir~ɾ tu mir~ɾəʦuk ******** nir~ɾaʦur~ɾ kakitizaan kir~ɾajkin musakaput tu miʦuduħaj u kamu nu sakizaja a kakitizaan tuki ****.**.** **:** natajniaj a tadəmaw ****bar~ɾa,***bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ,***sabak,***duŋj,***r~ɾisin,***ħar~ɾuku,***,***r~ɾubas,***duŋj,****tuku,***tipus mitər~ɾuŋaj ʦi sakamuaj a kawaw *.naʦir~ɾaaj a matatəŋir~ɾ a buħʦi *.**** a miħʦaan a pajbar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡaj a kawaw
